product.name: Archie and Maker
product.mission: Turn ambitious objectives into verified digital things.

roles.Archie: intelligence, research, derivation, planning, uncertainty, and proof-carrying programs
roles.Maker: permissioned execution, tools, isolation, verification, rollback, and delivery
roles.Foundry: candidate invention, matched experiments, independent evaluation, and release admission
roles.Weave: multi-agent and human coordination with authenticated work state
roles.Sideways: independent reference application and ordinary Maker target

capacity_target.palantir: synthesize fragmented state without centralized ownership of truth or authority
capacity_target.spacex: generalize high-speed sensing, engineering, testing, and iteration across many missions

first_impossible_proof.objective: Produce a polished secure tested installable application from a vague ambitious objective and an unfamiliar project context.
